feed.title: garden.errbufferoverfl.me - terrorism
feed.description: An open collection of notes, resources, sketches, and explorations I'm cultivating.

entry.title: Chasing Shadows
entry.summary: From Irish revolutionaries to the Christchurch massacre and the rise of right wing extremism, Chasing Shadows uncovers the long and brutal history of terrorism in Australia.
